name: API Layer
description: FastAPI routers, request-scoped dependencies, and error translation that expose auth, checkout, voids, lots, products, staff, shops, dashboard, users, and health endpoints.

name: Service Layer
description: Core business logic modules that enforce checkout, voiding, end-of-day, low-stock, and invoice-PDF rules independently of HTTP concerns.

name: Data & Persistence Layer
description: SQLAlchemy ORM models, the async DB engine/session bootstrap, and the Alembic migration chain that together define and evolve the Postgres schema for shops, users, products, lots, invoices, and audit logs.

name: Schemas & Types
description: Pydantic request/response schemas that validate and serialize data crossing the API boundary for auth, products, lots, checkout, EOD, and shop endpoints.

name: Security
description: JWT issuance/verification and bcrypt password hashing helpers used to authenticate users and protect credentials across the API.

name: Application Core & Bootstrap
description: The app factory, CLI provisioning tool, environment-driven settings, and structured logging setup that wire the FastAPI application together.

name: Test Suite
description: Pytest integration tests (with shared fixtures) mirroring the app package, covering auth, RBAC, checkout, voids, EOD, staff, products, low-stock, and health endpoints.

name: Infrastructure & Project Config
description: Local Postgres containerization, Alembic tooling config, environment variable template, and the Python project manifest that support running and building the system.

name: Documentation & Planning
description: Project README, the harness planning trail (intake, branch map, decision ledger, PRDs, absence hunt), and the early frontend design mockups that predate the real frontend app.

name: Application Shell
description: Bootstraps the React SPA (main.tsx, App.tsx, index.html), applies global styles and Tailwind design tokens, and provides Vite's ambient type declarations.

name: Pages & Routes
description: One React component per route (login, checkout, dashboard, receiving, products, staff, voids, shop config), each composing API calls and auth/shop-scope context into the screens shown to shop staff, owners, and superadmins.

name: API Client
description: Typed HTTP client (client.ts) plus per-domain wrapper modules (checkout, products, catalog cache, lots, staff, voids, shops, dashboard, offline finalize-queue) that talk to the FastAPI backend and are imported by nearly every page.

name: Auth & Multi-Shop Context
description: React context providers and JWT helpers that manage the authenticated session and the superadmin's 'acting shop' scope, consumed across almost all pages and shared components.

name: Shared Components
description: Reusable UI building blocks — the PIN entry keypad, the superadmin shop-switcher dropdown, and the role-filtered navigation sidebar — shared across multiple pages.

name: Offline Resilience Hooks
description: Custom hooks that detect browser connectivity and drain the offline checkout queue, enabling the POS screen to keep working through network outages.

name: End-to-End Tests
description: Playwright specs covering login, checkout resilience, dashboard, products, receiving, shop config, staff, and void-approval flows, driven by role-specific login helpers.

name: Build & Tooling Configuration
description: Project manifest, TypeScript project references, ESLint, Vite, Tailwind/PostCSS, and Playwright configuration that govern how the SPA is built, linted, styled, and tested.
